name: Web Development Certification
description: Recipient gained hands-on experience building web development projects using AI-assisted Coding with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Skills mastered include: understanding web technologies, responsive web design, CSS styling and layout, accessibility standards, site localization, prototyping, and writing and customizing code with AI assistance. Professional skills demonstrated include using generative AI to plan, build, and troubleshoot web development projects.
